---
title: "Resume"
---

<div class="resume-actions reveal">
<a class="btn-primary" href="files/resume.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Open Resume PDF</a>
<a class="btn-ghost" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/markuss-saule/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">LinkedIn Profile</a>
</div>

::: {.resume-layout}
::: {.resume-viewer .reveal}
<iframe class="resume-frame" src="files/resume.pdf#view=FitH" title="Markuss Saule Resume"></iframe>
<p class="resume-note">If the embedded viewer does not load in your browser, open the PDF directly with the button above.</p>
:::

::: {.resume-timeline}
## <span class="gradient-text">Experience Timeline</span>

<div class="timeline-item"><h4>May 2026 - Present: Volvo Group, Business Intelligence and Analytics Intern</h4><ul><li>Leading Adobe CJA migration work for digital journeys serving 3M+ monthly users across web funnels and vehicle configurators.</li><li>Eliminated two martech dependencies through tool rationalization, reducing annual software run-rate by $50,000.</li><li>Built statistical monitoring for traffic, sentiment, and funnels that detected a high-intent submission drop from 9% to 5%.</li></ul></div>

<div class="timeline-item"><h4>Oct 2024 - May 2026: BYU-Idaho Online Employment and Scheduling, Data and Campaign Analytics Coordinator</h4><ul><li>Optimized a $4,000 Meta recruiting campaign through segmentation, generating 2,250 qualified applicants.</li><li>Built KPI dashboards that increased hiring engagement by 320%.</li><li>Designed an AI-assisted screening workflow for 1,000+ global applicants.</li></ul></div>

<div class="timeline-item"><h4>Jun 2025 - Sep 2025: Fresno State University Sports, Digital Data and Insights Coordinator</h4><ul><li>Built a scoring model that ranked 350+ sponsor prospects and surfaced $370,000 in sponsorship value.</li><li>Automated dashboards that reduced weekly reporting time by 70%.</li><li>Guided audience, sponsorship, and campaign strategy across 4+ content channels.</li></ul></div>

<div class="timeline-item"><h4>2020 - 2024: Roblox Immersive Brand Worlds, 3D Environment Artist and World Build Lead</h4><ul><li>Built 3D environments, vehicles, terrain systems, props, and branded spaces across shipped Roblox experiences totaling 6.5B+ place visits.</li><li>Worked on large-scale brand and entertainment activations connected to Warner Music, Sony Entertainment, DC/Black Adam, Bakugan, L'Oreal, JDRF, and other global IP campaigns.</li><li>Balanced visual direction, player movement, performance budgets, launch deadlines, and brand constraints for high-traffic interactive worlds.</li><li>Personally commended by Roblox CEO David Baszucki for contributions during the early interactive concert era on Roblox.</li></ul></div>

<div class="timeline-item"><h4>Aug 2023 - Jul 2024: American Councils (US State Department), City Lead and Project Manager</h4><ul><li>Tracked participation and demographic data for 550+ program applicants.</li><li>Facilitated six data-informed leadership workshops with measurement loops.</li><li>Produced structured cross-border reporting for grant-compliance workflows.</li></ul></div>

<div class="timeline-item"><h4>Jun 2021 - Oct 2021: Ministry of Health of Latvia, Marketing and Analytics Intern</h4><ul><li>Analyzed vaccination trends for a national COVID-19 campaign reaching 175,000 people across Latvia.</li><li>Coordinated data and messaging across three departments to improve targeting and clarity.</li><li>Measured outreach performance to refine audience segments, content, and channel allocation.</li></ul></div>

## <span class="gradient-text">Education and Credentials</span>

- BYU-Idaho: BS Business Analytics (Apr 2027 target), 4.0 GPA
- Minors: Statistics, Data Science
- Certifications: Google BI, Google PM, Google Digital Marketing and E-commerce, IBM Business Analyst, DataCamp SQL Associate

## <span class="gradient-text">Project Signature</span>

- Earnings Quality Autopsy, a full-stack SEC/XBRL research system with nine forensic modules, 14 API routes, 187 tests, and source-backed analyst handoff
- Ravel, a CRAN-published RStudio AI copilot, and falsifyr, a CRAN-targeted package for adversarial testing of statistical claims
- Radiology Value Pipeline, a governed clinical AI workflow with model lineage, human review, audit trails, Power BI marts, and 0.9828 benchmark MRI AUC
- OWL, a local-first AI discovery daemon with a SQLite knowledge graph, MCP server, desktop application, and 98 tests
- Roblox immersive brand-world production across shipped games and global activations totaling 6.5B+ place visits
:::
:::
